publishedAbstract: Uninstall Regional Disaster Recovery Disaster Recovery (DR) can be partially uninstalled or completely uninstalled. Partially uninstalled would be to remove all DR resources and configuration from two (or more) peer managed clusters defined in a DRPolicy. Complete uninstall would be to remove all DR policies and mirrorpeers for all peer clusters followed by removing the hub cluster DR operators and associated resources.
publishedTitle: Uninstall Regional Disaster Recovery for ODF 4.19+
